raw_consumer_statement: I made a purchase for {$110.00} on XX/XX/XXXX. I did not recognize the merchant on my bill and called Citibank to verify the merchant. I was told the charge was from the XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX of Courts. I did not make a charge to the XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX so I disputed the charge and the charge was credited to my account. After further investigation I determined that charge was actually to a wine merchant that I recallled making a purchase from. The original credit was made by Citibank on XX/XX/XXXX. The credit was reversed on XX/XX/XXXX after I notified Citibank that I acknowledged the charge and was dropping the dispute. The charge was reversed again on XX/XX/XXXX. I spoke with Citibank on multiple occasions about the double reverse charge and they acknowledged the double reverse and said my account would be credited. I spoke with XXXX on XX/XX/XXXX, XXXX on XX/XX/XXXX, XXXX on XX/XX/XXXX and XXXX on XX/XX/XXXX. All representatives acknowledged the double reverse and said my account would be credited. The {$110.00}. To date my account has not been credited. This problem is purely the result of customer service at Citibank
